name: Caribou Burgers
recipeIngredient: Bread crumbs or other cereal optional
recipeInstructions:
Because caribou has little fat content, add some pork for juiciness.
Combine all ingredients while handling as minimally as possible. Preheat grill or broiler.
Brush burgers with vegetable oil and cook on the grill for about 4 minutes, turning once and cooking to desired doneness. Serve on rolls with your preferred condiments.
